case_title: PAUL O'GRADY DBA O'GRADY PLUMBING VS. CAFE FLOR

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAUL O'GRADY DBA O'GRADY PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE FLOR
